description: This file controls how monster statistics increase per level based on the current game type and difficulty. The "(N" text in field names signifies to use that specific value for games in Nightmare difficulty. The "(H)" text in field names signifies to use that specific value for games in Hell difficulty. "L-" signifies the field is used for Ladder Battle.net game types, otherwise its used for Non-Ladder Battle.net / Singleplay / Open Battle.net / TCP. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Level
columns.description: An integer value to determine how to scale the monster's statistics when at a specific level

columns.name: AC
columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).

columns.name: AC(N)
columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).

columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).

columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).

columns.name: L-AC(N)
columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).

columns.description: Percentage multiplier for increasing the Monster's Defense (multiplies with the monstats.AC).
